zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Vere於1110年6月2日出生在英國諾福爾可登哈姆時，她的父親Aubrey II de Vere46歲，母親Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare16歲。她於大約1146年與Payne de Beauchamp在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1170年享年60歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾其善茲 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese de Vere于1110年6月2日出生在英国諾福爾可登哈姆时，她的父亲Aubrey II de Vere46岁，母亲Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare16岁。她于大约1146年与Payne de Beauchamp在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1170年享年60岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾其善茲 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Vere was born on 2 June 1110, in Hedenham, Norfolk, England, her father, Aubrey II de Vere, was 46 and her mother, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, was 16. She married Payne de Beauchamp about 1146, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1170, at the age of 60, and was buried in Chicksands Priory, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Vere est née le 2 juin 1110, à Hedenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Aubrey II de Vere, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Payne de Beauchamp environ 1146, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1170, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Chicksands Priory, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese de Vere am 2. Juni 1110 in Hedenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubrey II de Vere 46 und ihre Mutter Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare 16. Sie hat um 1146 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Payne de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1170 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in Chicksands Priory, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Vere è nata il il 2 giugno 1110 nel Hedenham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Aubrey II de Vere, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Payne de Beauchamp circa 1146, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1170, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Chicksands Priory, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Vereが1110年6月2日にイギリスノーフォルクヘデンハムで生まれた時，父Aubrey II de Vereは46歳，母Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clareは16歳であった。約1146年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでPayne de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1170年に60歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアチクサンズ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Vere(이)가 1110년 6월 2일 영국 노르폴크 헤데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubrey II de Vere(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Payne de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 칙산드즈 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Vere nasceu em 2 de junho de 1110, em Hedenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aubrey II de Vere, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Payne de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1146, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1170, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Chicksands Priory, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Vere родилась 2 июня 1110 г. в местности хеденам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Aubrey II de Vere было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Payne de Beauchamp около 1146 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1170 г. в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности шикксэндс приори, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohese de Vere nació el 2 de junio de 1110, en Hedenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Aubrey II de Vere, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Payne de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1146, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1170, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Chicksands Priory, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
